title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: tests/test_compressed_session_state.py (第 1 至 110 行，共 110 行) ---
   1 | """Phase 3 tests for structured compressed session state."""
   2 | 
   3 | import pytest
   4 | 
   5 | from core.compression_engine import (
   6 |     CompressedSessionState,
   7 |     CompressionEngine,
   8 |     CompressionStrategy,
   9 | )
  10 | from core.turn_builder import TurnBuilder
  11 | 
  12 | 
  13 | def phase3_messages():
  14 |     return [
  15 |         {"role": "user", "content": "实现 Phase 3 CompressedSessionState，并更新 tests/test_compressed_session_state.py"},
  16 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "计划：\n✅ 已完成: 阅读架构文档\n⏳ 未完成: 运行 pytest\n决定采用规则提取作为 deterministic fallback"},
  17 |         {
  18 |             "role": "assistant",
  19 |             "content": "调用写文件工具",
  20 |             "tool_calls": [
  21 |                 {"id": "call_write", "type": "function", "function": {"name": "write_full_file", "arguments": '{"path":"core/compression_engine.py"}'}}
  22 |             ],
  23 |         },
  24 |         {"role": "tool", "tool_call_id": "call_write", "name": "write_full_file", "content": "成功修改 core/compression_engine.py 和 tests/test_compressed_session_state.py"},
  25 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "运行 python -m pytest tests/test_compressed_session_state.py -q"},
  26 |         {"role": "tool", "tool_call_id": "orphan", "content": "孤立 tool，不能进入状态"},
  27 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "❌ 测试失败: AssertionError in tests/test_compressed_session_state.py"},
  28 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "修复后 ✅ 2 passed in 0.10s。注意: 不要保留半截 assistant tool call/tool 响应"},
  29 |     ]
  30 | 
  31 | 
  32 | def test_compressed_session_state_serialization_and_prompt_rendering():
  33 |     state = CompressedSessionState(
  34 |         task_goal="目标",
  35 |         current_status="in_progress",
  36 |         completed_steps=["完成 A"],
  37 |         pending_steps=["待办 B"],
  38 |         files_changed=[{"path": "core/a.py", "action": "modified"}],
  39 |         tests_run=[{"command": "pytest", "status": "passed"}],
  40 |         errors_encountered=[{"message": "Error: boom"}],
  41 |         key_decisions=["采用 deterministic fallback"],
  42 |     )
  43 | 
  44 |     restored = CompressedSessionState.from_dict(state.to_dict())
  45 |     rendered = restored.render_for_prompt()
  46 | 
  47 |     assert restored.task_goal == "目标"
  48 |     assert "### 压缩后的会话状态" in rendered
  49 |     assert "文件变更" in rendered
  50 |     assert "关键错误" in rendered
  51 | 
  52 | 
  53 | def test_extract_compressed_state_from_turn_metadata():
  54 |     engine = CompressionEngine()
  55 |     turns = TurnBuilder().build(phase3_messages())
  56 | 
  57 |     state = engine._extract_compressed_state(turns)
  58 | 
  59 |     assert state.task_goal.startswith("实现 Phase 3")
  60 |     assert any("阅读架构文档" in step for step in state.completed_steps)
  61 |     assert any("运行 pytest" in step for step in state.pending_steps)
  62 |     assert any(item["path"] == "core/compression_engine.py" for item in state.files_changed)
  63 |     assert any(item["status"] in {"failed", "resolved"} for item in state.errors_encountered)
  64 |     assert any("deterministic fallback" in decision for decision in state.key_decisions)
  65 |     assert any(test["status"] == "passed" for test in state.tests_run)
  66 |     assert any("半截" in note for note in state.tool_safety_notes)
  67 |     assert all("orphan" not in turn_id for turn_id in state.source_turn_ids)
  68 | 
  69 | 
  70 | @pytest.mark.asyncio
  71 | async def test_keyframe_result_carries_structured_state_and_preserves_tool_pairs():
  72 |     engine = CompressionEngine()
  73 | 
  74 |     result = await engine.compress(
  75 |         phase3_messages(),
  76 |         strategy=CompressionStrategy.KEYFRAME,
  77 |         target_ratio=0.45,
  78 |         min_keep=4,
  79 |     )
  80 | 
  81 |     assert result.success
  82 |     assert result.compressed_state is not Non...
